author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Star Atlas CORE is Returning with Act 2!

The wait is almost over! 

Will Timpo's time vortex lead to unparalleled opportunities? Or will our ragtag band of misfits share in the newfound oblivion of the mind? 

Find out next Wednesday, July 19th, when we release Act 2 - Episode 1 on our Galactic Marketplace and Magic Eden!

Catch up on Act 1 episodes for free - https://play.staratlas.com/core-graphic-novel/

 | Collectible covers from Act 1 - https://play.staratlas.com/core-graphic-novel/?utm_medium=social
